question: For the quarterly data platform, which statement is best supported by the 100% stacked bar chart?

options.A: Q4 has the highest number of online searches compared to the other quarters.
options.B: Complaints received make up a larger share than online searches in every quarter.
options.C: The total number of platform interactions increases steadily from Q1 to Q4.
options.D: The combined percentages of all three metrics indicate overall platform performance for each quarter.

explanation: 100% stacking normalizes unrelated categories to 100% within each quarter. Valid inferences include within-quarter ranking (e.g., one metric > another in every quarter). Invalid inferences include cross-quarter total comparisons or combining unrelated categories.
